recommendations.title: Celtic Pride
recommendations.overview: Two over-loyal Celtic fans kidnap their opponent's star player in order to guarantee their team the championship.

recommendations.title: Me, Myself and Her
recommendations.overview: Two women -- a restaurateur and an architect -- have a seemingly idyllic romantic relationship, until the latter encounters a man she had a fling with.

recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet the Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: As novice detectives, Bud and Lou come face to face with the Invisible Man.

recommendations.title: Batman
recommendations.overview: The Dynamic Duo faces four super-villains who plan to hold the world for ransom with the help of a secret invention that instantly dehydrates people.

recommendations.title: Best of the Best 2
recommendations.overview: In an underground fight club, blackbelt Travis Brickley is killed after losing to the evil martial arts master Brakus. Travis' death is witnessed by Walter Grady, the son of his best friend Alex Grady. Alex and his partner, Tommy Lee, vow to avenge t

recommendations.title: Ages of Love
recommendations.overview: In Italy, three men fall in love with three women. First a young engaged lawyer has a fling, then the middle-aged married man has a fling, then a retired man falls in love with his friend's daughter.

recommendations.title: An Affair to Remember
recommendations.overview: A couple falls in love and agrees to meet in six months at the Empire State Building - but will it happen?

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: This Means War
recommendations.overview: Two top CIA operatives wage an epic battle against one another after they discover they are dating the same woman.

recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
